## v1.5 Notes

- This release inserts **HC IX preferred** disambiguation lines for top collision terms (Spiral 6).

- Symbol-level collisions (e.g., $\tau$, $\Delta\tau$) are addressed in `HCIX_Symbol_Collision_Notes_Top40_v1.5.md`.

- Appendix: HC IX Equation Disambiguation — Spiral 7 (v1.5)

- Appendix: HC IX τ (Spiral Time) — Equation Closure (Spiral 8) — v1.5

- Appendix: Toolshed Principle (Looking Along / Looking At) — Spiral 12 (v1.5)

- Appendix (author provenance): Spiral Time (Carey, March 2009) — v1.5
